title: Orchestrator isolates concurrent tasks and posts a supervisor digest

turns.name: run concurrent tasks with isolation and digest
turns.text: Exercise concurrent orchestrator tasks with supervisor digest.
turns.responseText:
two concurrent orchestrator tasks stayed isolated, user message forwarded only to orchestrator-scenario-session-1, and supervisor emitted one room digest covering both active tasks: 📡 Task update — 2 active
🚀 Alpha transcript parser — active (1 running) · Ada
🚀 Beta browser callback — active (1 running) · Lin
